prompt: A safety instruction poster for using a jetpack, designed in the bold graphic style of 1940s WPA work safety campaigns
prompt_refined: A safety instruction poster for using a jetpack. The poster should be designed in the bold graphic style of 1940s WPA work safety campaigns, featuring strong, simplified lines, flat colors, and a limited color palette. Include a stylized illustration of a person engaged in jetpack use or safety procedures, accompanied by clear, concise instructional text.
objects: Graphic representation of jetpack safety procedures
